transcript.text:
The octopus is so cute
[How cute?]
[I just want to bite you]
Hello everyone
I'm here at Daejeon today
I had a shoot for a program down here in the South and was told there's a famous kimbap (seaweed roll) place
So I'm here
There's a restaurant called "Jeonju Chojang House" in Jeonju
This is like their 2nd location
What's unique about them is that they give you chojang (red chili paste with vinegar) as a dipping sauce
I'm very curious Let's head inside
[I'm here to eat all the Kimbap]
Hello, I called earlier Yes, Tzuyang?
Hello
Thank you
Our menu is here on the wall

I'll take 1 order of octopus
5 orders of mini Kimbap for now
1 order consists of 3 rolls
5 orders will be 15 rolls Yes
[Understood]
I saw ramyun noodles on the blog You guys have that, right?
That will come out as a side menu
Can I have 3 of those for now Okay
Tzuyang, can we please get a photo?
Thank you
The turban shell is really good Really?
Excuse me Can I have 1 order of the turban shell?
Kimbap and noodles go well together
Thank you
I'll leave a comment on this video
I'm hungry

The octopus is so cute
[Boiled as a whole]
Thank you
[A common reaction.jpg]
It's really cute
So cute
[I will eat you]
Thank you
Does it have guts?
I love it
Bon appetit
It looks delicious
Let's start with ramyun
It has shrimp, crab,
scallop too It's huge
The seafood taste is amazing

Here's the turban shell Thank you
Thank you
It came out as a whole Just the way I like it
I'll finish this first It's so good
The seafood flavor is amazing I've been craving some noodles
Amazing
It's very savory thanks to all the seafood
Now for the kimbap
Let's eat the end
The spam is sticking out
Let's dip it in chojang
That's good
I don't really like chojang
But this goes really well together
The kimbap has texture and it's not soggy
It's pretty solid

I like it
I love how everything is very solid-like
2 of these
Some soup
[Kimbap+Ramyun=Love]
Crab too
It has a lot of meat
It goes well with the young radish kimchi
Kimbap goes really well with ramyun
A piece of kimbap and finishing it off with some soup is the best
This is actually a bar, but I didn't order any alcohol
2 pieces
There are not too many ingredients inside, but it's tasty
Let's dip it in the soup
I sound like an old man
I've been really craving ramyun

So I didn't get to try other dishes yet
Let's try the octopus now
It's very tender
I'm loving the chojang sauce
Let's cut the whole leg out
Dip it in ramyun
Ramyun soup octopus
It's very tender
Turban shell too
It's in season right now, right? It's so good
The texture is amazing
It has its own unique flavor
Thank you for recommending me this
Kimbap and ramyun
These small kimbaps really can't go wrong
It's good with a lot of sauce too

It feels like a hangover cure
Shrimp
The guts
It's pretty big
I think the meat will be really tender
We'll see
It's good
Dip it in chojang
Delicious
Aren't these considered pretty big? For a mini kimbap
It's pretty long
The mini kimbaps are usually bite-sized
Turban shell
The guts It's yummy
Amazing
Its guts are tasty

I find myself eating mindlessly
This has a lot of carrots I had no idea
A lot of vegetables, but it's good
Here's the head
I've forgotten about it
Be careful, it can squirt on you
[Ink alert]
Look at that ink
Thank you
Looks good
I go crazy for octopus guts, baby octopus guts, and webfoot octopus guts
These are good even without any sauce
The head is the best part
The meat is very soft
It's much more tender than the legs
[Looking professional]

I'm going to cut this part out I like it better without it
You can enjoy it more without this tendon
You can't eat that?
This chewy part?
[Goodbye white shirt]
Just to eat it with ease It hurts my jaw
Octopus
Octopus legs
It's better to eat it in pieces Chewy and tasty
The texture is crunchy
Gotta eat this before it gets cold
Octopus head
So tender
Last bite of the octopus
Was this here the whole time?
[Ssamjang (Soybean chili paste)]

I love this
It's good with the shell and the octopus
I'll eat the rest of the turban shell with this
How about kimbap?
Kimbap and ssamjang
Should I sell this at my restaurant?
There's perilla leaf inside!
I think that's why it gave so much texture
Not me just realizing that right now
I thought it was the seaweed that was crunchy
[Finished]
That was a simple late-night snack for today
Thanks everyone~ [Subtitles by Hyun Choi] [antharoni@gmail.com]
